case_title: SERVPRO OF THE SUNSET VS. ONE SHOT TATTOO ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SERVPRO OF THE SUNSET AS TO DEFENDANT ONE SHOT TATTOO ROSE TEA SHOP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES NONE LISTED. SERVED MAR-24-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ONE SHOT TATTOO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERVPRO OF THE SUNSET

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. "AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS ARE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT ROSE TEA SHOP WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY SANDRA WATTS--PRESIDENT/ CEO. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT ROSE TEA SHOP. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ONE SHOT TATTOO
